title: 5.4.1 missing setup.exe on release, Podman download link broken on main website.
body:
### Issue Description

On the main website, when dropping down from the download button, you can select Podman CLI for Windows, but in doing so, you end up on a 404 page on Github.

https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/download/v5.4.1/podman-5.4.1-setup.exe

The desktop download works as expected.

comments.body: yes the installer for windows was not build yet, https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/25545
